name: Nerf Herder
description:
'''Nerf Herder''' is an American [[Rock music|rock]] band from [[Santa Barbara, California]], formed in 1994 by [[Parry Gripp]] (vocals, guitar), Charlie Dennis (bass) and Steve Sherlock (drums). They describe themselves as a "[[geek rock]]" band, and are known for simple modern punk-style songs with frequently humorous, juvenile, and pop-culture-referencing lyrics.

The band's name is a reference to a line of dialogue between [[Princess Leia]] and [[Han Solo]] in [[The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars: Episode V – The Empire Strikes Back'']].

Their 1997 single "Van Halen", a tribute to the [[Van Halen|band of the same name]], received significant radio airplay and led to their first major record deal with [[Arista Records]].  They also composed and performed the [[theme music]] to the television series ''[[Buffy the Vampire Slayer (TV series)|Buffy the Vampire Slayer]].''
